SugarCRM: UXMetrics custom module

Dec 2016

uxjs

UXMetrics is a custom module designed to test user experience by capturing various metrics of a number of pre-defined flows within the app.

Code: github.com/f1vlad/UXMetrics

Video

Captured demo of UXMetric usage during SugarCON event.

Role: UX Engineer / Front-end Engineer
